name: perl-cisco-copyconfig
title: perl-cisco-copyconfig
summary: Provides methods for manipulating Cisco devices
description:
Provides methods for manipulating Cisco devices
Cisco::CopyConfig provides methods for manipulating the running-config
of Cisco devices running IOS via SNMP directed TFTP.  This is handy for
making changes or backups on many devices without having to log into each
device or write messy expect type scripts that need constant tweaking.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use perl-cisco-copyconfig because Provides methods for manipulating Cisco devices.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use perl-cisco-copyconfig as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair perl-cisco-copyconfig with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `perl-cisco-copyconfig --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
